description.overview: The Havanese is Cuba's national dog. They're cheerful, intelligent, and make wonderful companions. Known for their springy gait and silky coat.
description.temperament: Havanese are happy, outgoing dogs who love everyone. They're intelligent and eager to please. Great with children and other pets.
description.health: Generally healthy but watch for eye problems, luxating patella, and hip dysplasia.
description.exercise: Moderate exercise needs. Playful and enjoy activities with their owners. Good for apartment living.

verdict.summary: Cheerful, intelligent, and hypoallergenic. Havanese are wonderful family dogs that do well in apartments. Need regular grooming but don't shed much. Great first-time dog.
